nasb.text: For He has had regard for the humble state of His bondslave; For behold, from this time on all generations will count me blessed.

esv.text: for he has looked on the humble estate of his servant. For behold, from now on all generations will call me blessed;

cnv.text: 因為他垂顧他婢女的卑微， 看哪！今後萬代都要稱我為有福。

ccb.text: 因祂眷顾我这卑微的婢女， 从今以后， 世世代代都要称我是有福的。

csbs.text: 因为他看顾他婢女的卑微。 看哪，从今以后， 世世代代都要称我有福，
